raw_consumer_statement:
Please see the attached letter from Citbank, which was a response to my complaint regarding 2 fraudulent charges on my LL Bean Mastercard, one for {$500.00} and a second one for {$550.00}. 

After an investigation and complaint here to CFPB, Citibank agreed that the charges were fraudulent and promised to credit my account for the two charges play {$15.00} in associated interest. This is stated in the letter,. 

This never happened and I have been waiting since XXXX. I am owed at least {$1000.00} and would appreciate prompt action.
